summary: Frontend-only Playwright validation of Consolidación Master del Módulo de Seguimiento y Vulnerabilidades (Iteration 24). VERIFIED: (1) The 4 vista tabs exist with correct data-testids and filter correctly: Activas con Fecha=15 rows (15 'VENCIDA' badges); En Análisis=15 rows (17 '⏳ En Análisis' text matches incl. header+rows); En Retest=0 rows (data-dependent; no current vulns in retest state); Histórico Cerrado=15 rows all showing 'Corregido' status. (2) The Resultado Retest dropdown contains exactly the 7 required estados with correct descriptions. (3) Date field disabling logic verified for Desestimado/Para Re Test/Nota de Seguimiento (disabled=true) and Pendiente/Impedimento/Vulnerable (disabled=false). 'Corregido' state could not be re-verified in browser due to modal interaction issue, but code review of SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx lines 1476-1503 confirms 'Corregido' is in the estadosSinFecha array and will be correctly disabled. (4) The Vulnerabilidades detail modal exposes both 'Información' and 'Bitácora de Seguimiento' tabs; switching to Bitácora renders <TimelineSeguimiento readOnly={true}/> showing the required 'Los registros se crean desde el Módulo de Seguimiento de Riesgos' message; NO btn-registrar-seguimiento button exists in this read-only context (confirmed via screenshot).

issues: Still uses native browser date picker (<Input type='date'/>) instead of shadcn Calendar component - inconsistent with rest of the app (carried over from iteration_23, not yet fixed).

passed_tests: /seguimiento-riesgos loads and shows KPI vencidas=24, Total Pendientes=31, 4 vista tabs visible
tab-activas-con-fecha: 15 rows displayed, 15 '⚠️ VENCIDA' badges rendered, AlertaVencidaBadge component working
tab-en-analisis: rows render with '⏳ En Análisis' amber-colored badge (vistaActiva==='en_analisis' branch line 1143)
tab-en-retest: 0 rows (no data) - tab clickable, page renders empty state without error
tab-historico: 15 'Corregido' rows visible with green emerald badge variant
Form dropdown select-resultado-retest shows all 7 estados with descriptive labels: Corregido/Pendiente/Impedimento/Vulnerable/Desestimado/Para Re Test/Nota de Seguimiento
input-fecha-compromiso is disabled=true when state=Desestimado, Para Re Test, Nota de Seguimiento
input-fecha-compromiso is disabled=false when state=Pendiente, Impedimento, Vulnerable
Vulnerabilidades.jsx detail modal renders Tabs with values 'info' & 'bitacora' (Información / Bitácora de Seguimiento)
Bitácora tab in Vulnerabilidades mounts <TimelineSeguimiento vulnId={...} readOnly={true}/> which shows the literal text 'Los registros se crean desde el Módulo de Seguimiento de Riesgos'
No 'btn-registrar-seguimiento' button is present in Vulnerabilidades modal (read-only mode correctly enforced)
action_items: (Optional) Replace native <Input type='date'/> with shadcn Calendar component in SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx line 1519-1526 for UI consistency

(Optional) Refactor SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx (currently 1669 lines, was 1291 in iteration_23 - grew further) into smaller modules (TimelineImpedimentos already extracted; consider extracting RegistroSeguimientoForm, VistaTabs, AlertaVencidaBadge into separate files to honor the 700-line guideline)
critical_code_review_comments: SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx: estadosSinFecha array is duplicated at lines 1476 and 1502 - extract to module-level const to DRY
SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx: 1669 lines - far exceeds the 700-line guideline (and grew vs prior iteration). Form + tabs + table + modal are coupled in one file

SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx line 1530: warning message '⚠️ Se incrementará el contador de reprogramaciones' is shown by simple string compare with viewingItem.fecha_compromiso - if backend stores as ISO datetime vs date string, comparison may yield false positives. Verify timezone normalization

Vulnerabilidades.jsx line 1425: <TimelineSeguimiento> is rendered even when viewingVuln.id is undefined initially; ensure component guards against missing id (it appears to handle it but worth a fallback render)

Backend (carried over from iter23, status unknown): VulnerabilidadBase.historial_impedimentos_seguimiento default is Optional[List[dict]]=None which leads to MongoDB $push failures - main agent should change to default_factory=list and run a one-time migration

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 review_request items verified via Playwright + DOM inspection + screenshot)

seed_data_creation: No new test data created in this iteration. Prior iter23 created a TEST_UI bitacora entry on vuln a4300dbf-e61d-42b8-8205-5890035278ab that was not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from the review_request pass. The 'En Retest' tab currently has zero rows in the seeded data; to fully exercise the '🧪 En Retest' badge UI, a vuln with last historial entry resultado_retest='Para Re Test' must be created (POST /api/seguimiento/{id}/registrar with that resultado, then re-load /seguimiento-riesgos?vista=en_retest). The form date-disabled logic for 'Corregido' state was not re-verified after a modal-reopen issue in the test run, but the source code in SeguimientoRiesgos.jsx lines 1476 and 1502 explicitly includes 'Corregido' in estadosSinFecha array so it WILL behave correctly. Backend null-array bug from iter23 may or may not be fixed - was not retested here; main agent should verify migration ran. Vulnerabilidades route is /vulnerabilidades (not /vulns). Use data-testid='view-btn-{id}' in Vulnerabilidades vs 'view-vuln-btn-{id}' in SeguimientoRiesgos - they differ!
